creator: wilko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Shibata-san, 

I'm trying to clean up some old PRs/change requests and I just saw your's. 
I cannot verify the contents of your patch anymore, as the file 
is (long?) gone from ftp.freebsd.org. Can I assume the SCSI-CAM system that 
is part of FreeBSD 3.X / 4.X and -current addresses your needs? 

Thanks  
Wilko
